subcodes.title: Ziyarat dar shab-i-jum'ah
subcodes.first_line: If thou findest thyself in the likeness of the night within the garden of sanctity and the precincts of fellowship... Verily, their sustenance doth come to them both morn and eve [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاذا کنت فی مثل للیلة فی روضة القدس و حضیرة الانس... للرزق یاتیهم رزقهم بکرةً و عشیاً
